name: @aqua/plugin-leads-pipeline
description: Aqua portal leads-pipeline plugin — CSV contact import, single-shot email campaigns, lead/contact domain. Auto-binds to the leads-kind pipeline created by T1's foundation seed (R034). Agency-scoped (scopePolicy: 'agency'), opt-in (core: false). v1 covers Lead+Contact CRUD, idempotent CSV import, declarative AudienceFilter, send-now Campaign dispatch via the email-sender plugin's queue, and a public-funnel.lead.captured subscriber. Drip sequences, open-rate tracking, A/B campaigns, lead scoring are post-ship.
